Introduction
    2020 Billboard Music Awards is a TV special starring Demi Lovato, Garcelle Beauvais, and Taraji P. Henson. The 2020 BILLBOARD MUSIC AWARDS is a music ceremony that honors artists, albums and songs that dominated to Billboard charts...
